center.name: 雅普拉河
center.summary: 雅普拉河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括鼠灰蚁鵙，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its range also extends east into western Brazil to the Japurá River and beyond south of the Amazon to the Madeira River. The mouse-colored antshrike primarily inhabits lowland terra firme and white-sand evergreen forest
